title: get_main_dashboard_without_authentication
description: Verify that a GET request to the root endpoint '/' without authentication returns a 200 status and loads the main dashboard UI successfully.

title: get_inventory_list_success
description: Verify that a GET request to '/api/inventory' returns a 200 status with a list of inventory items, allowing users to review current stock and item states.

title: get_forecast_shortage_predictions
description: Verify that a GET request to '/api/forecast' returns a 200 status with valid shortage prediction data for supply chain planning.

title: post_optimization_with_valid_payload
description: Verify that a POST request to '/api/optimize' with a valid optimization request payload returns a 200 status with an optimized distribution plan.

title: get_orchestration_status_success
description: Verify that a GET request to '/api/orchestration/status' returns a 200 status with current orchestration health or workflow status information.

title: get_governance_policies_list
description: Verify that a GET request to '/api/governance/policies' returns a 200 status with a list of governance policies for compliance review.

title: post_ai_chat_with_valid_prompt
description: Verify that a POST request to '/api/ai/chat' with a valid prompt returns a 200 status with an AI-generated response from the orchestration agents.

title: post_log_error_with_valid_payload
description: Verify that a POST request to '/log-error' with a valid error payload returns a 200 or accepted response and logs the error in the centralized bug reporter.

title: post_copilot_chat_success
description: Verify that a POST request to '/api/v1/ai/copilot/chat' with a valid supply chain query returns a 200 status with an AI-generated copilot response.

title: post_copilot_chat_history_success
description: Verify that sequential POST requests to '/api/v1/ai/copilot/chat' retain and ground responses in conversation history.

title: get_live_inventory_status_and_warehouse_utilization
description: Verify that GET requests to the live stock endpoint (/api/v1/inventory/stock) and Next.js precalculated dashboard (/api/dashboard/inventory) return 200 status codes and valid JSON objects representing live stock counts and warehouse configurations.
